choices.label: Disbandment of the Warsaw Pact at a meeting of its members in Budapest.
Marie-Adélaïde, the eldest of six daughters of Guillaume IV, becomes the first reigning Grand Duchess of Luxembourg.

events_used.text: Disbandment of the Warsaw Pact at a meeting of its members in Budapest.
